title: Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine
tagline: Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine — spiritual town of Puducherry

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine, Puducherry

overview.short: Shrine of Our Lady of Lourdes, Villianur, Puducherry (French: Sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Lourdes) is a Catholic Marian shrine and a parish church in Villianur, Puducherry, India.
overview.description: Shrine of Our Lady of Lourdes, Villianur, Puducherry (French: Sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Lourdes) is a Catholic Marian shrine and a parish church in Villianur, Puducherry, India. The shrine is dedicated to the Blessed Virgin Mary under the title of Our Lady of Lourdes. Pope Leo XIII issued a pontifical decree of coronation on 21 February 1886 towards the venerated Marian statue and declared the site an official Marian shrine. The former Archbishop of Pondicherry, François-Jean-Marie Laouënan executed the rite of coronation on 8 May 1886.

topPlaces.name: Villianur
topPlaces.description: Villianur or Villianoor, Villenour in French, is a commune panchayat and the headquarters of the Villianur taluk of Puducherry District. Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine and Kameeswarar temple are two major landmarks in the town.

topPlaces.name: Villianur taluk
topPlaces.description: Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.

topPlaces.name: Villianur commune
topPlaces.description: Villianur is one of 5 Communes in Pondicherry district in the Indian territory of Puducherry. Villianur Commune comes under Villianur Taluk Of Puducherry District.

topPlaces.name: Villianur firka
topPlaces.description: Villianur is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Kameeswarar temple
topPlaces.description: Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Kurumbapet
topPlaces.description: Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Uzhavarkarai
topPlaces.description: Uzhavarkarai (Tamil: [uɻɐʋɐɾhɐɾɐi̯]) is a city, a municipality and a taluk in Puducherry district in the union territory of Puducherry. The enclaves of Kalapet and Alankuppam are parts of Uzhavarkarai municipality.

topPlaces.name: Mangalam, Puducherry
topPlaces.description: Mangalam is a panchayat village in Villianur Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

items.note: Villianur or Villianoor, Villenour in French, is a commune panchayat and the headquarters of the Villianur taluk of Puducherry District. Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine and Kameeswarar temple are two major landmarks in the town.
Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.
Villianur is one of 5 Communes in Pondicherry district in the Indian territory of Puducherry. Villianur Commune comes under Villianur Taluk Of Puducherry District.
Villianur is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.
Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

Uzhavarkarai (Tamil: [uɻɐʋɐɾhɐɾɐi̯]) is a city, a municipality and a taluk in Puducherry district in the union territory of Puducherry. The enclaves of Kalapet and Alankuppam are parts of Uzhavarkarai municipality.
Mangalam is a panchayat village in Villianur Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (128 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (142 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine?
faq.a: The top attractions are Villianur, Villianur taluk, Villianur commune, Villianur firka, Kameeswarar temple.
